related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: XI. Justice
related.teaser: Justice is the shining scale of truth, sword of balance cutting illusion from the real.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: ᛁ Isa
related.teaser: Isa is the winter bar — the breath held before the next tide.

related.name: Cassiel
related.teaser: Cassiel is a bedrock of becoming — Hourglass; under Saturn; in Capricorn.

related.name: XV. The Devil
related.teaser: The Devil is the shadow of matter — chains of illusion where desire binds the soul to form.

related.name: ♍ Virgo
related.teaser: Virgo is the wheat of Earth — patient harvester, discerning servant, keeper of order.
